summary.intent: Diagnose and fix Jenkins build failures in the aos-cd-builds/build/layered-products job across multiple builds (1806, 1812, 1813, 1816) that were failing with GitHub App multi-installation errors.
summary.outcome: Fixed the root cause in konflux_client.py where ensure_git_auth_secret() was calling get_github_app_token_from_env() without org context. Created a new get_github_app_token_for_org(org) function, updated ensure_git_auth_secret() to accept an org parameter (defaulting to 'openshift-priv'), added tests, and pushed the changes to the github-app-transient-git-auth-secret branch.

repo: art-tools repo contains doozer/elliott build tooling for OpenShift
Pre-commit hooks require unrestricted sandbox access to run
User's fork is at ashwindasr/art-tools with origin remote
Branch github-app-transient-git-auth-secret was already addressing GitHub App authentication issues

code.finding: _auto_detect_single_installation() raises ValueError when GitHub App has 4 installations (['operator-framework', 'openshift-priv', 'openshift', 'openshift-eng']) and no explicit installation_id is provided

ensure_git_auth_secret() was calling get_github_app_token_from_env() without org context, causing multi-installation failures during build phase while rebase phase succeeded using URL-based resolution

Existing _resolve_installation_id(org, ...) handles org-aware installation resolution; _generate_app_token_for_url(url) handles URL-based token generation; git auth secrets primarily need openshift-priv org access

workflow: Rebase phase succeeded using get_github_git_auth_env(url=...) which resolved org from URL, but build phase failed using bare get_github_app_token_from_env() without org context
When GitHub App is installed in multiple orgs, org-specific resolution is mandatory - cannot auto-detect
Pattern: add org-aware public functions rather than exposing private URL-based ones

friction: Pre-commit hook initially failed in sandbox, required retry with dangerouslyDisableSandbox
Remote naming confusion - CLAUDE.md referenced 'dev' remote but repo actually used 'origin' for fork and had 'locriandev' remote
open_items: Build 1812 had separate issue: oadp-velero-restic-restore-helper image not found in ocp-build-data oadp-1.5 branch - not addressed
Pre-existing branch changes in konflux_fbc.py, images_konflux.py, fbc.py, konflux_olm_bundler.py, test_konflux_client_git_auth.py remain uncommitted
Fix needs Jenkins validation to confirm it resolves the layered-products pipeline failures
